---
title: "Investing in Artificial General Intelligence"
date: today
date-format: long
format:
  html:
    output-file: ai_lab_investment.html
  pdf:
    output-file: ai_lab_investment.pdf
authors:
  - name: Vincent Grégoire
    affil-id: 1
    affiliation:
      - ref: 1
affiliations:
  - id: 1
    name: HEC Montréal
abstract: |
  Frontier AI laboratories racing toward Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) face uncertain timing of transformative demand and must decide how much irreversible capacity to build and how to split it between inference (current revenue) and training (future capability).
  I develop a real-options model with regime switching, duopoly competition, endogenous default risk, and diminishing returns calibrated to AI scaling laws.
  The model delivers analytical investment triggers and a duopoly preemption equilibrium in which the leader trains more and invests earlier than the follower.
  A "faith-based survival" mechanism emerges: training raises the expected post-AGI continuation value, lowering the default boundary---the hope of AGI keeps the firm alive.
  An asymmetric dilemma arises: conservative underinvestment is costlier in expected value, but aggressive overinvestment carries substantially higher tail (default) risk.
  Calibration to four AI lab archetypes illustrates how heterogeneity in beliefs about AI timelines drives cross-sectional variation in investment behavior.
keywords:
  - real options
  - AI infrastructure
  - regime switching
  - training-inference allocation
  - duopoly preemption
  - default risk
thanks: "I thank Armand Jr Brunelle, Tolga Cenesizogly, Joshua Gans, Charles Martineau, and Piotr Orłowski for helpful comments. AI assistance was used extensively in writing this paper; the code for the project and details on the use of AI tools are available at \\url{https://github.com/fintech-research/ai-lab-investment}. Vincent Grégoire: HEC Montréal (vincent.gregoire@hec.ca)."
---


{{< include _introduction.qmd >}}

{{< include _model.qmd >}}

{{< include _calibration.qmd >}}

{{< include _valuation.qmd >}}

{{< include _discussion.qmd >}}

{{< include _conclusion.qmd >}}

\newpage
\clearpage

{{< include _appendix.qmd >}}

\newpage
\clearpage

## References {.unnumbered}

\begingroup
\raggedright
::: {#refs}
:::
\endgroup
